_comment_about_this_file: Template openclaw.json for a fresh OpenClaw deployment. Replace <PLACEHOLDERS>, push to ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json on the VPS, restart gateway. Verify schema against your installed OpenClaw version before pushing — schema can change between releases.

<AGENT_NAME>._comment: Replace <AGENT_NAME> with a slug like 'rfi_triager'. Replace channel ID and allowFrom IDs. Add more agents below by duplicating this block, and remember to also update every OTHER agent's allowFrom to include the new bot's ID.

discord._comment_security: groupPolicy=allowlist + allowFrom restricts who can reach this bot. Combined with a private Discord channel (only the user + agent bots have View+Send), this is defense in depth.
